Environmental Protection.summary: Hoeven consistently opposes federal environmental regulations, particularly those restricting energy development and fossil fuel production.
voted_for: Energy Infrastructure Act supporting fossil fuel development (Senate vote, 2017)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Hoeven supports tax cuts and opposes progressive tax increases on high earners and corporations.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Hoeven has opposed federal legalization of marijuana and supports enforcement of federal drug laws.
voted_against: MORE Act - federal marijuana legalization (did not advance, 2020)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Hoeven has consistently voted for restrictions on abortion access and against expanding reproductive health services.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, 2018)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Hoeven has opposed federal LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality and workplace protections.

Environmental Protection.summary: Cramer opposes most federal environmental regulations and prioritizes energy development over environmental restrictions.
voted_for: Disapproval of EPA Clean Water Rule (Senate vote, 2019)

Police Accountability.summary: Cramer has opposed federal police reform legislation, expressing support for law enforcement without additional oversight.
voted_against: George Floyd Justice in Policing Act (Senate procedural vote, 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Cramer supports maintaining lower tax rates and opposes progressive tax increases.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (House vote as Representative, November 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Cramer opposes federal marijuana legalization and has supported enforcement of federal drug laws.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Cramer has consistently voted against abortion access and for restrictions on reproductive health services.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (House vote, 2017)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Cramer has opposed federal LGBTQ+ protections and voted against marriage equality legislation.

Environmental Protection.summary: Fedorchak took office in January 2025; limited federal voting record available as of May 2026.

Energy Policy.summary: As former Public Service Commissioner, Fedorchak supported energy development including fossil fuels and has championed North Dakota energy interests.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Mitskog has opposed abortion restrictions in the North Dakota legislature and supported reproductive health access.

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Mitskog has supported LGBTQ+ protections and opposed discriminatory legislation.
voted_against: HB 1297 - transgender student bathroom bill (ND House, 2023)

Public School Funding.summary: Mitskog has supported increased public education funding in the North Dakota House.
Marschall has supported education funding measures in the North Dakota legislature.

Public School Funding.summary: Novak has voted for public education funding measures.

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Schauer has supported legislation restricting transgender rights in North Dakota.

Public School Funding.summary: Schauer has supported increased funding for public education.

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Foss has opposed discriminatory legislation targeting LGBTQ+ individuals.

Public School Funding.summary: Foss has supported increased public school funding in the legislature.

HB 1474 - ban on gender-affirming care for minors (ND House, 2023)
